data.title: Bitcoin Tumbles Around $80,000, Experts See $60,000 Floor If BTC, ETH, XRP Continue Downtrend
data.description: Crypto experts weighed in on Bitcoin‘s (CRYPTO: BTC) price drop below $80,000 on Thursday, predicting potential price bottoms for major cryptocurrencies amid

data.title: Weibo Ad Revenue And MAUs Drop In Q4, Stock Slides
data.description: Weibo Corp (WB) reported 1% Y/Y revenue decline of $456.83M, beating analyst estimate. Adjusted EPS of 40 cents missed consensus of 48 cents. Advertising revenue down, VAS revenue up. Dividend of $0.82/ADS declared. WB stock up 1.67% premarket.

data.title: Why Nasdaq-100 Leveraged ETF TQQQ Is Falling
data.description: TQQQ is trading lower by 6.6% Thursday afternoon. Major indexes are lower despite softer-than-expected Feb. PPI data. Continued tariff concerns may be weighing on market sentiment.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Agri Stock Picks: Corteva's R&D Edge, FMC's Pipeline, And Mosaic's Phosphate Advantage Set Up Strong Growth
data.description: Goldman Sachs analyst initiates coverage on major US agriculture input stocks due to stabilizing macro environment and strong pricing power.

data.title: Pfizer's Direct-To-Consumer Model Faces Scrutiny From US Senators (UPDATED)
data.description: Senators question Pfizer's partnership with UpScriptHealth, citing potential anti-kickback concerns and risks of increased costs in federal health programs.
